fundamentals.name: Snowflake Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Snowflake Inc. provides a cloud-based data platform for various organizations in the United States and internationally. The company's platform includes artificial intelligence (AI) Data Cloud, which enables customers to consolidate data into a single source of truth to drive meaningful business insights, build data applications, and share data and data products, as well as applies AI for solving business problems. It serves financial services, advertising, media and entertainment, retail and consumer goods, healthcare and life sciences, manufacturing, technology, telecom, travel and hospitality, and government and defense industries, as well as the public sector. the company has a collaboration with OpenAI, L.L.C. for the development of AI solutions for joint enterprise customers that deliver tangible return on investment. The company was formerly known as Snowflake Computing, Inc. and changed its name to Snowflake Inc. in April 2019. Snowflake Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Menlo Park, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with impressive revenue and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable and trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter's EPS beat estimates by 21.9%; next earnings date is 2026-08-26.
positives: Revenue growth 33.5% YoY, with analyst estimates for the current fiscal year at 53.5%.
Free cash flow of $1.67B TTM indicates strong operational cash generation.
Last quarter's EPS beat estimates by 21.9%.
Consensus rating is 'strong_buy' with a mean target price of $277.03.
negatives: Operating margin of -22.2% and profit margin of -23.8% indicate unprofitability.
Return on equity of -54.9% and return on assets of -10.5% show poor returns on capital.
Forward P/E of 96.28x and Price/Sales of 17.24x represent a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 142.91% suggests significant leverage.

news.paragraph: Snowflake experienced a significant surge, gaining 36% on Friday following a strong Q1 earnings report where AI was cited as a key driver. The company also announced a substantial $6 billion deal with a major cloud provider, further boosting investor confidence. This positive news flow, coupled with a 'strong buy' consensus from analysts, suggests strong momentum for the stock.
